text:
MongoDB
DISASTER RECOVERY & 30-MIN IRG
Standby Clusters: Active/Standby Replication & Failover®
HOW STANDBY WORKS
• Oplog-based replication via 53— no direct cross-site network link required
Standby Clusters — Sub-minute
RTO, oplog-based, near-zero RPO
• Sub-minute RTO, near-zero RPO — non-readable standby, separate cluster
• Fully supported resilience/DR with only 2 sites
• Managed via OM and/or MKC - break glass failover possible without OM
• Licensed as an independent EA add-on
• Private Preview: June 1 | Public Preview (production-supported): September 30
Active Region
Backup / Restore - Point-in-time
restore & granular restore, but RTO
measured in hours
Multi-DC High Availability -
Automated recover sane or
supports 3+ locations
